---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear description of the feature or improvement.

## Motivation

- How would this help learners?
- What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

- **New sessions**: topics covered
- **Documentation**: what to add
- **Practice files**: exercises included

## Location

- [ ] New session: Level X, Session Y
- [ ] Existing session: `docs/sessions/LX/SY.md`
- [ ] Practice files: `src/LX/SY/...`
- [ ] Documentation: `docs/...`
- [ ] Scripts: `scripts/...`

## Educational Alignment

- [ ] Supports 30-minute learning segments
- [ ] Beginner-friendly
- [ ] Zero-copy (original content)
- [ ] Builds on previous sessions logically
- [ ] Respects session-bucketing (`docs/meetup/L1/sessions.md`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Reviewed [Master Plan](../../docs/01_Python-Fundamentals-MasterPlan.md)
- [ ] Read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)
